creator: anarcat@lethe.koumbit.net
text:
The attached patch upgrades the ledgersmb12 port to 1.2.17.

Note that all ledgersmb versions before 1.2.15 are vulnerable to various security issues. I'm not sure how to fit this in the portaudit stuff... See:

http://ledgersmb.org/node/70

Also note that the ledgersmb port can probably be retired (in favour of the ledgersmb12 port).

Fix: Note that I have brought back the dependencies that were removed in the latest update.
